alkylation reagent: 100 μL of 55 mM iodoacetamide in 50 mM AB
alkylation concentration: 100 μL of 55 mM iodoacetamide in 50 mM AB
cleavage agent: rehydrated for 45 min at 4 °C in 35 μL of a solution of 50 mM AB containing trypsin at 10 ng/μL
collision energy: fragmented by higher-energy collisional dissociation HCD at 27% normalized collision energy (NCE)
enrichment method: A total of 50 µL of Ti-IMAC beads (ReSyn Biosciences) per sample were washed twice
fragmentation method: fragmented by higher-energy collisional dissociation HCD
instrument: LC-ESI-MS/MS was performed on a Q-Exactive Plus Hybrid Quadrupole-Orbitrap Mass Spectrometer
ionization type: directly applied by ESI into an Orbitrap Q-Exactive HF mass spectrometer
labeling: T. gondii tachyzoites were cultured using HFFs as host cells.
